title: mentha × niliaca var. similis
intro: Mentha × niliaca var. similis, also known as Bergamot mint, is a hybrid species of mint that combines the characteristics of Mentha niliaca and Mentha aquatica. It is a perennial plant that has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Bergamot mint include relief from digestive issues, colds, and flu, as well as its ability to reduce stress and anxiety. Bergamot mint can be prepared as a tea, infused oil, or added to herbal remedies, and it is also used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and improve mood.
